ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Continued To Apr-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Gross for Kenneth Auletta.

Mr. Gross stated that they have been working on the accounting since December, that his Client moved from the residence and is living in temporary housing, and that his Client will not be able to pull everything together. Status on close of estate is continued to April 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed one week prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
